summary: Comprehensive testing of BC Catalog Sync Layer. All 41 backend tests passed including 24 unit tests and 17 API tests. The catalog has 1000 items and 169 GL accounts synced from BC Production. All catalog endpoints working correctly.
passed_tests: API: GET /api/gpi-integration/catalog/status - returns 1000 items, 169 GL accounts, sync metadata
API: GET /api/gpi-integration/catalog/items?q=glass - returns matching items (glass bottles, jars)
API: GET /api/gpi-integration/catalog/items - empty query returns items, limit parameter works
API: GET /api/gpi-integration/catalog/items/10004785 - returns single item (16 oz Vinegar glass bottle)
API: GET /api/gpi-integration/catalog/items/12001210 - returns single item (32 oz Vinegar glass bottle)
API: GET /api/gpi-integration/catalog/items/FREIGHT/validate - returns valid:false, reason:not_found (expected - FREIGHT is mapping rule item, not BC catalog)
API: GET /api/gpi-integration/catalog/gl-accounts?q=expense - returns matching GL accounts (Bad Debt Expense, etc)
API: POST /api/gpi-integration/catalog/suggest-items - returns ranked suggestions with _match_score
Item Mapping: Mapping rules with non-existent items (FREIGHT) still work (not rejected by catalog)
Item Mapping: SO preflight returns resolved_lines with mapping metadata
Integration: 20 mapping rules all pointing to FREIGHT item which is not in BC catalog - correctly handled
seed_data_creation: Catalog already synced: 1000 BC items (glass bottles, jars, etc) and 169 GL accounts from Production. Known items: 10004785, 12001210. 20 item mapping rules configured pointing to FREIGHT.
context_for_next_testing_agent: BC catalog sync working correctly. Collections: bc_catalog_items (1000 items), bc_catalog_gl_accounts (169 accounts), bc_catalog_sync_meta. Real BC items include glass bottles like 10004785 and 12001210. FREIGHT is NOT a real BC item but is used in mapping rules and correctly returns not_found (not blocked). Catalog endpoints: /catalog/status, /catalog/items, /catalog/items/{item_no}, /catalog/items/{item_no}/validate, /catalog/gl-accounts, /catalog/suggest-items.
